prompt: Just finished a TTL cache implementation with tests. Baseline commit is ghi9012. Please perform an adversarial review.
assertions: The review identifies at least 1 finding (code is not perfect)
The review mentions the time.sleep in tests as a potential concern
Findings are ordered by severity (Critical/High before Medium/Low)
Each finding includes a file location reference
The review uses the F{N} [{Severity}] format for findings
The review process uses a subagent (Agent tool) for information asymmetry
Each finding is classified with a validity label (Real, Noise, or Undecided)
The output includes a summary table with severity counts and validity breakdown
The output presents resolution options [W], [F], [S] at the end
